commentary_text: hint of swing in but slips down leg, wide called
lovely shape, deadly accurate as it comes in from outside off, defended back
slants across on a length, pushed to point
reaches out to square drive, but this has slipped far too wide outside off, through to the keeper
right in the slot and Rahane whips him over mid-on! This one sails all the way. Incredible timing and wrist work.
slants across a touch fuller, pushed to mid-off
on the pads and Rahane clips it nicely off the pads towards long leg, terrific work by Naman Dhir on the boundary - put in a full-length dive after running nearly 20 yards to save two runs
defended back, not off the middle. Rolled off the inner half
nice shape away from middle, defended back
punched back, Hardik puts his left hand out on his followthrough to stop
punched firmly to mid-off, three dots in a row
Not where he intended. Looked to pull, but flew off a thickish inside edge past short fine
nice shape away off a length, pushed to mid-off again
beaten as he looks to wallop the pull in front of square
tucked through square leg for a single
skids one through on a length as it drifts in, whipped to square leg
now he's up and running! Too short and he rocks back to hammer that over square leg.
Drops short again, Allen picked length early as he rocked back to pummel that over wide long-on.
fuller, swung in late to hit the pad as Allen looked to whip it square. Going down leg
into orbit again! Once again very short, Allen muscles this over deep midwicket. He'll put those away effortlessly
half-volley on the pads and Rahane plays a sumptuous flick over deep backward square leg. Sails into the second-tier nearly.
Too short, Rahane swivels around to hit this a lot flatter over the fine leg boundary. Rahane just used Hardik's pace and lent direction
hit high on the body as he tries to work it to the leg side, they scamper a leg bye
pulled mercilessly, down towards the short leg-side boundary. Races past deep square
dug in short, down leg and over the batter's head. Wide called
too full and slaughtered down the ground, he couldn't have hit it straighter. Fifty up!
walks across and scoops this short ball from around sixth or seventh stump and still manages to hit it between keeper and short fine. Mayhem here!
uses the pace nicely to tickle it fine for four! Rahane's wrist work magical, Bumrah too straight on that occasion.
tucked past square leg for a single
hocked over midwicket! Not timed as well as he would've liked but swung hard at that. Bumrah went cutter on that occasion.
slapped to mid-off, they scamper a quick single. Hardik didn't pick it up cleanly.
no run
pulled to deep square as they jog the single
1 run

Allen looks to go downtown but ends up dragging this slower delivery to wide long-on. KKR were running away with it, so this is a big wicket. That was bowled at 117kph. Finn Allen c Tilak Varma b Thakur 37 (17b 6x4 2x6 26m) SR: 217.64
pushed wide of cover to get off the mark.
punched on the up through extra cover, the timing and placement exquisite. Shardul took pace off, but Rahane still managed to time that beautifully.
mistimes a flat-batted pull to mid-on
sat up nicely as Rahane lofts him over his head for four! Clean strike that
pushed through quicker outside off, eased to long-off
flatter one outside off once again, this one's shorter and Rahane punches this into the gap at deep extra cover. He's looked busy. And in sparkling form

massive appeal for lbw. The drift in may have made this tricky. Rahane played down the wrong line, and the impression was the ball was slipping down leg. But MI have opted to review. Replays confirm a clear gap between bat and ball. Ball tracking comes back to tell us this would've missed leg, the n

Flat-batted and straight down the ground to clear long-off. Mind you this wasn't full, in fact a length ball. Rahane's backswing was magnificent as he cleared his front leg and muscled it down town for a 75-metre hit.
whips this down to deep midwicket for a single
Green says I'm here too. This is too full and Green simply extends his arms and uses all that reach to great effect as he simply lofts this cleanly to hit that into the second tier over wide long-on.
works it down the ground to long-on
shortish and sliding down, tucked to long leg once again as they jog the single
punched to deep point for a single. Once again there wasn't much turn
short and sliding down, Green turns it gently to fine leg for a single
slides down, Rahane looking to paddle fine but lets it pass, wide called
tucked to square leg for a quick single, looks for a second but is sent back.100 up in real quick time for KKR
pushed to deep cover for a single
too much width, Green reaches out to slap this towards wide long-off. Excellent running
uses the pace to direct this behind point! Green didn't try to hit it hard. Pure timing and placement. Gorgeous
full on the pads, worked to the man at deep midwicket
looks to sweep him off his length, but ends up smashing it onto his thigh pad, they take a run off the deflection

dug in short, Green tries to get on top of the bounce and slap but has ended up picking the lone man at deep cover. Green will be livid with himself. Shardul took pace off, and the moment Green hit it he knew the timing was slightly off, and that was enough. Cameron Green c Rutherford b Thakur 18 (1
Thakur to A Raghuvanshi,  1 run steered to third man to get off the mark
full on the pad, flicked to wide long-on
off a thick edge as he looks to flay this through point, it flies to short third where Markande misfields to concede two. Rahane brings up a half-century
1 run
Boult to A Raghuvanshi, FOUR runs uses the width and the pace of Boult to unfurl a lovely little punch behind point. Opened the bat face late to find the gap
whips this to deep square leg. Pinged the middle of his bat as he transferred his weight back
pulled to deep square, Boult took pace off and Rahane hit it off the bottom
This is flat and full outside off but Rahane reaches out, gets under it, and launches it over long-on. Into the stands!
Tucked into the midwicket region and they'll ease their way to two. This was full on leg
This time the length is slightly shorter, but still around leg. Tucked off his pads through midwicket for two more
On a length outside off, punched back towards the non-striker. Ghazanfar shuffles across
Misses the big sweep but the umpire isn't moved. Rahane got down for the slog on this full ball outside off. Height an issue?
Ghazanfar to A Raghuvanshi, no run Full and quick on off, Raghuvanshi looks for the sweep but the ball ricochets off his gloves onto his body
Slower back of length ball outside off, Rahane sways back for the ramp, but there's no pace on this. Ends up dabbing it to short third
Bumrah to A Raghuvanshi,  1 run Looks for the yorker outside off, it pitches just a tad short. Raghuvanshi works it down to long on. This was at 115kph
Bumrah nails this 134kph yorker on off. Rahane does just as well to jam his bat down and keep it out. Squeezes it out to the off side for a quick run
Bumrah to A Raghuvanshi, no run 135kph in the blockhole around off. Raghuvanshi can only lob a bump ball back to the bowler
Bumrah to A Raghuvanshi,  1 run Bumrah goes pace off and very full again. Rahane manages to chip it back over the non-striker to get Rahane on strike
132kph, full outside off and angling in, Rahane just flicks it away to deep midwicket on the bounce, happy to play Bumrah out
Very low full toss on the stumps, Rahane gets his bat down and keeps it out
Low full toss outside off as Boult searches for the yorker. Lobbed to long-on on the bounce
Boult goes for the wide yorker, Raghuvanshi looks to shuffle across and sweep him to the leg side, but is early into the shot on this cutter
Boult to A Raghuvanshi,  2 runs In the blockhole again, Raghuvanshi opens the bat face to steer it out to deep backward point
Boult to A Raghuvanshi, FOUR runs Cross-seam delivery is in the slot on leg and Raghuvanshi just flicks it away past short fine leg. The fielder had just moved finer and Raghuvanshi finds that gap
Raghuvanshi backs away early and Boult tries to follow him. Squeezed out to cover for a single
Thakur to A Raghuvanshi, no run Starts off with a slower bouncer outside off. Raghuvanshi had backed away so he has to reach out but can't connect. Done in by the lack of pace there
Thakur to A Raghuvanshi,  1 run Looks for the yorker on off. Turns into a very low full toss and Raghuvanshi can only clip it out to deep midwicket

Shardul Thakur can do no wrong today! Three overs, three wickets! Rahane falls with the pressure building. Cross-seam full ball outside off. Rahane tries to go inside out but it comes off the toe end. Hardik Pandya at cover back-tracks and takes a simple catch. Rahane falls for 67 off 40, having lai
Full on off and going across, Rinku jabs at it and gets an inside edge onto his pads. Ball drops to his left and they take the single
Thakur to A Raghuvanshi, FOUR runs Slashes at it but the top edge finds the boundary
Thakur to A Raghuvanshi, no run Full toss on off, Raghuvanshi meets it with a crisp drive, but straight to the cover fielder
Ghazanfar to Rinku Singh, FOUR runs On a length outside off, Rinku swiftly backs away to this carrom ball, waits on it, and cuts it away through backward point. Great placement
Ghazanfar to Rinku Singh,  2 runs Tossed up full outside off, Rinku eases a drive through the cover region. Long-off has a long way to make so they are able to pick up two

Ghazanfar to Rinku Singh,  1 run Full outside off, Rinku reaches out and squeezes it out between backward point and short third. Rohit at short third comes in and collects and nails the throw at the non-striker's end but Rinku was safely in. This was fired in at 110kph
Ghazanfar to A Raghuvanshi, no run Raghuvanshi now looks for a reverse-sweep as Ghazanfar goes full and wide. Misses out
Ghazanfar to A Raghuvanshi, FOUR runs Shelled at long-on by Rohit Sharma! And it's four, to add insult to injury
Ghazanfar to A Raghuvanshi,  SIX runs This one, he got a hold of alright!
Boult to Rinku Singh, FOUR runs Boult tries to follow Rinku who was backing away, but it's a full toss and Rinku flays this over point. Shot!
In the blockhole on off, squeezed out to cover
Clipped out through square leg for a single
Yorker on the stumps, Raghuvanshi squeezes it out through point
Bumped in short. Rinku ducks. And the umpire waits a while before signalling wide
Full toss outside off, flicked wide of long-on. They race to get two
Full outside off, Rinku drives it past the bowler to long-off's left
Very full on leg, swung away along the carpet to deep square leg

Thakur to A Raghuvanshi,  2 runs Raghuvanshi misses out! And almost gets run out! Slot ball around off, he nails a cover drive but picks out the fielder. They'd taken off for the single, and the throw at the non-striker's end goes just wide, with Raghuvanshi short of the crease. They get a second as
Thakur to A Raghuvanshi,  SIX runs Attempted yorker becomes a slot ball outside off and he launches it over long-off
Thakur to A Raghuvanshi,  1 run Short outside off, he swats it down into the midwicket region, bringing the bat down and across
Shardul beats the swing! On a length around off and angled across at 116kph, the ball stays low as well as Rinku misses his drive on the off side
Thakur to Rinku Singh, FOUR runs Rinku Singh is resourceful as ever!
Bumrah to A Raghuvanshi, FOUR runs Raghuvanshi sweeps Bumrah behind square leg for four!
Bumrah to A Raghuvanshi, no run Raghuvanshi looks to back away but Bumrah follows him with a pin-point toe crusher. Angkrish can only block it back to the bowler
Bumrah to A Raghuvanshi,  1 run Low full toss, eased to long-on
Low full toss around leg, Rinku backs away and squeezes it out to long-off
Bumrah to A Raghuvanshi,  1 run Now Bumrah goes for the pace-on yorker. Raghuvanshi jams his bat down and gets it through midwicket
Rinku moves leg side, Bumrah follows him and Rinku is able to squeeze it out through point
In the blockhole on leg, swung away on the bounce to deep midwicket. Couldn't quite get under that. 200 up for KKR

Hardik to A Raghuvanshi, 1 wide Hardik sees Raghuvanshi shuffle across and tries to go wide of his arc. Raghuvanshi still can't reach it as the ball veers away from him. Umpire reckons that's wide even with Raghuvanshi's movement before the delivery
Hardik to A Raghuvanshi, FOUR runs Sliced away over backward point!

Hardik bowls it away from Raghuvanshi, making him reach out and he skies it off the toe end towards deep cover. Tilak settles under it and this time, Raghuvanshi's catch is taken. Angkrish Raghuvanshi c Tilak Varma b Pandya 51 (29b 6x4 2x6 50m) SR: 175.86
Length ball outside off, Ramandeep swings it down to long-on
Full around middle, Rinku again can't connect cleanly as he swings it out to deep square leg
Low full toss on off, he swings it away towards deep midwicket. They come back for a second, and the throw at the non-striker's end is a poor one, otherwise the batter was in trouble
Bumrah to Rinku Singh, (no ball) Rinku backs away and Bumrah goes wide and across. No wide given.
Bumrah tries to follow Rinku down leg, but it goes down leg. Another free hit coming up
Full toss on his body, Rinku, backing away, flicks it towards deep square leg, where the catch is taken. No six, but more importantly for KKR, Rinku is not on strike as they took the single
137kph yorker on off, Ramandeep does well to keep this out! After his first over, Bumrah has been so so good!
Bumrah to Rinku Singh, FOUR runs Sliced over point and KKR get close to 220. Full toss outside off and Rinku punishes it
Rinku takes on another full toss, but can't get that clean connection. Came off high on the bat. But it doesn't carry to deep midwicket. They do well to get two
Yorker on off, Rinku's bottom hand comes off as he chips it down to long-on
Full and going down leg, Ramandeep shuffles across to sweep and misses. Umpire thinks that's fine but KKR review that for wide. Third umpire reckons that's just fine and
